metadata.tagline: Power up with clean energy. No sugar or caffeine
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: (Smile genuinely, make eye contact) "Hi there! I couldn't help but notice you look like you're in need of a little pick-me-up. Happens to the best of us! I'm [Your Name]. What's typically your go-to when you're feeling that afternoon slump?"

"Hey [Friend's Name]! You know how you're always talking about feeling drained by mid-afternoon? I've actually been using something really interesting that's made a huge difference for my energy without any caffeine. Have you ever looked into natural ways to boost your vitality without stimulants?"...

"Hi [Name]! I saw your post about struggling with energy lately, and I can totally relate – it's a common challenge these days. I've found a game-changer for clean, sustained energy that's completely drug-free. Would you be open to hearing about a unique approach that's helping a lot of people ditc...

"Hi [Prospect Name], this is [Your Name]. [Referral Name] mentioned you recently, and knowing how much you value natural health solutions, they thought you might be interested in what I do. They shared that you've been looking for ways to get more sustained energy without relying on coffee or energ...

(Listen actively to their comment about fatigue) "Oh, I hear you on that! It seems like everyone is looking for ways to keep their energy up these days. I actually work with a really cool, innovative technology that helps the body naturally produce its own clean energy. It's completely drug-free. H...

questions.question: Tell me a little about your typical day. What are your biggest energy challenges or goals right now?
When do you typically feel your energy dip, and how does that impact your productivity or mood?
How does feeling tired or relying on stimulants affect your daily life, your family, or your ability to do the things you love?
If you could wave a magic wand, what would your ideal energy levels feel like throughout the day, without any negative side effects?
What have you tried in the past to boost your energy, and what did you like or dislike about those solutions?
Are you concerned about the long-term effects of caffeine or energy drinks on your health?
Beyond just 'more energy,' what specific improvements are you hoping to see in your focus, clarity, or overall well-being?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how satisfied are you with your current energy levels and how you manage them?
What's the biggest frustration you have with your current energy routine?
If you found a way to get sustained, clean energy without any stimulants, what difference would that make for you?

content.problem: You know the feeling — you're dragging by 2 p.m. and reaching for another cup of coffee or an energy drink just to get through the rest of your day. You're tired of the jittery spikes and the crashes that follow, but you don't know what else to do. It feels like your only options are stimulants or just powering through on fumes.
content.agitate: Here's the thing — that cycle doesn't just leave you tired, it takes a real toll over time. Caffeine disrupts your sleep, which makes tomorrow even worse, and before you know it you're dependent on a substance just to feel normal. Your body deserves better than a chemical rollercoaster that never actually solves the problem. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: That's exactly why Boost exists. It uses Vibrotactile Technology — or VTT — to work with your body's own natural energy pathways, giving you clean, sustained energy without putting a single chemical into your system. No caffeine, no stimulants, no crash — just your body doing what it was designed to do, with a little signal to get it going.

objections.response: I totally get it. Quick question — how much are you spending on coffee, energy drinks, or pre-workout each month? Most people spend $100-$200 without even realizing it. Boost gives you clean, sustained energy for a fraction of that, with zero crash. What would it be worth to cut that cycle entirely?
objections.psychology: Reframe cost by comparing to existing daily energy drink and coffee spend

objections.response: Absolutely, take your time. I'm curious — what's the main thing you'd want to feel sure about? Is it whether it'll actually replace your morning coffee, or more about how the clean energy feels compared to caffeine? I want to make sure you have everything you need.
objections.psychology: Isolate the real hesitation by anchoring to their specific energy routine

objections.response: That makes total sense — health decisions often affect the whole household. What do you think their biggest question would be? A lot of couples actually end up both using Boost once they see how it replaces the daily coffee-and-energy-drink habit and saves money. Would it help if I shared some info they could review too?
objections.psychology: Position Boost as a household cost-saving decision, not just a personal purchase

objections.response: Healthy skepticism — I respect that. Boost uses Vibrotactile Technology, which works with your body's own neural pathways to support natural energy production. No caffeine, no stimulants entering your bloodstream. What would convince you — would you want to try it for a day and see how you feel by 2 PM without reaching for that afternoon coffee?
objections.psychology: Let them define proof by proposing a tangible, low-risk personal test tied to their daily energy dip

objections.response: I hear that a lot — most people have tried caffeine pills, energy drinks, B-vitamin shots, you name it. What happened with those? Usually it's the crash, the jitters, or it just stopped working. Boost is fundamentally different because VTT doesn't put any substance into your body — it works through your nervous system. What was the thing you disliked most about what you tried before?
objections.psychology: Differentiate VTT from every stimulant-based product they've been burned by

objections.response: No problem at all. Just out of curiosity — are you happy with your current energy levels throughout the day, or is it more that you haven't found something that actually works yet? Sometimes people tell me they're 'not interested' because they've given up on finding a real solution. If that's the case, Boost works completely differently from anything you've tried.
objections.psychology: Distinguish between genuine satisfaction and resignation from past disappointments

objections.response: I hear you — you're busy, and that's exactly why this matters. Boost is literally peel-and-stick, takes 5 seconds. No mixing powders, no brewing coffee, no stopping at the drive-through. How much time and energy would you get back if you weren't chasing your next caffeine fix every few hours?
objections.psychology: Reframe Boost as the time-saving alternative to their current energy routine

objections.response: Good question — what are you comparing it to? Most energy products — whether it's coffee, Red Bull, or caffeine supplements — put a stimulant into your body that gives you a spike and then a crash. Boost uses VTT to work with your nervous system to support your body's own energy production. Nothing enters your bloodstream. That's a completely different approach. What matters most to you — the initial kick, or sustained energy without a crash?
objections.psychology: Highlight that VTT is a fundamentally different mechanism vs. all stimulant-based competitors

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: Love it — so you're ready to ditch the energy drinks and finally have sustained energy all day without the crash. Let's get your Boost order shipped out — what's the best address?
techniques.when: They've expressed frustration with caffeine, energy drinks, or afternoon crashes and are clearly excited about a clean alternative

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you like to start with a 30-day supply to feel the difference, or go with the 90-day pack so you're covered through the whole season without worrying about running out mid-month?
techniques.when: They're sold on ditching caffeine but weighing how much to commit to upfront

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a promotion running right now that won't last — and honestly, every day you're still relying on coffee and energy drinks is another day of crashes and jitters. Want to lock this in so you can start feeling sustained energy this week?
techniques.when: They agree Boost sounds great but keep saying 'maybe later' — remind them the afternoon crash isn't waiting either

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So let me make sure I've got this right — you're tired of the caffeine rollercoaster, you want clean energy that lasts all day with no crash, and you want something drug-free that actually works. That's exactly what Boost delivers. Ready to get started?
techniques.when: Long conversation covering multiple energy pain points — tie it all together before the ask

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: Now that you're getting off the energy drink cycle, who else do you know — a coworker, a friend, maybe someone who's always running to the coffee machine — who'd love to hear about this?
techniques.when: After they've purchased and are excited about ditching caffeine — channel that energy into sharing with coworkers and friends who rely on stimulants

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How are your energy levels? Noticing any changes in your stamina throughout the day? Are you feeling more alert?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that could use a natural energy boost?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
